title: Record default ZDR footer badge contract
prompt: Create reports/zdr-footer-badge.md with sections for Default ZDR, Telemetry opt-in, Privacy status, and Evidence path.

fixtureActions.content:
# ZDR Footer Badge Contract

## Default ZDR
footer shows a zdr badge by default when telemetry is unset — zero-config privacy posture

## Telemetry opt-in
footer switches to tel when SUPERLIORA_TELEMETRY is explicitly enabled

## Privacy status
/status privacy rows stay dense and ZDR-friendly by default

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + footer-media-badge/status-panel vitest
